rules.unanimity: every reviewing bot in the chain must approve; one rejection quarantines the pack
rules.final_sign: only the top-ranked commanding officer grants PASS
rules.promotion: +1 rank when a bot's approval is later validated clean by the Prime-Mandate swarm (or a rejection is validated correct); -1 rank when validated wrong
rules.rotation: after 3 review rounds the General steps down to rank 1 (Lamp-Private); the highest-ranked bot takes command
